column1: Ritual purification: Used in certain ceremonies for cleansing and purifying spaces or individuals.
Ward off spiders: Folklore suggested that placing horse chestnuts in homes could deter spiders and insects.
Anti-inflammatory agent: Extracts from horse chestnuts were utilized for their potential anti-inflammatory properties in traditional medicine.
Wealth attraction: Some believed that carrying horse chestnuts could attract prosperity and financial success.
